meaning: adj.海面升降的,海面变化的
examples: Eustatic cycle is the interval of time during which a eustatic rise and fall of sea level takes place.
Community response: Each eustatic cycle will result in reorganization of benthic Marine communities, forming a new biotic assemblage.
Compared with the global change of sea level, the eustatic cycle of Lower Yangtze area is somewhat different because of its particularity.
